name: macros
description: Subagent orchestration workflows, session modes, and command shorthands: map-reduce, chunked (sequence a task as ordered parts that add up to the whole), research-backed critique, consensus review, sequential passes, rigor mode, askme, delegate, tmi, dry-run, timeless, dredge (search prior chats), and timestamp (prefix new files/folders with a date-CLI stamp)
